text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Question! Why is it that my bangs come<n>together
so flawlessly?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A. Because I'm a genius! B. To show off<n>my
beautiful face! C. A blessing from<n>above!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The correct answer is... ALL OF THE<n>ABOVE! As a
consolation prize, I bless<n>you with a smile from
ME!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead! Take it all in! BASK in the joy<n>my face
brings!
